display.name: Silent Grave Mound
display.short_description: A low grave mound sits just off the road with its cairn stones freshly straightened. A wax stub and a burial coin rest under the top marker.

choices.label: Set the marker stones right
choices.summary: Take one quiet minute to restack the slipped cairn and let the hush settle your breathing before you move on.

choices.label: Lift the burial coin
choices.summary: Break the wax seal and pocket the small dead-money bundle before the road asks who saw you do it.
